properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Enter in through the gates Enter in here with praise Come before him come bring your song We are your people he is our god

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: For the lord is good and His love endures His love endures :/ Forevermore his faithfulness it has no end For the lord is good and His love endures His love endures

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Enter in to his courts Enter in with grateful heart Come before him come bring your song We are his people he is our god

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Raise you voice shout for joy all the earth We sing a new song now We sing a new song now
